title: Better Villages
description: This mod enhances the villages in Minecraft by improving existing structure, making them feel more alive and engaging to explore.
body:
## Intro : This mod enhances the villages in Minecraft by improving existing structure, making them feel more alive and engaging to explore. Better Villages improves the overall appearance and layout of the villages, adding new design of the houses. The mod aims to create a more immersive and realistic experience for players. Better Villages is a great mod for players who enjoy exploring and interacting with villages in Minecraft, and it provides new gameplay options and challenges for those looking to add some variety to their Minecraft experience. If you're looking to enhance your Minecraft gameplay and experience, Better Villages is definitely a mod worth checking out!" - Plains Village - Snow Village - Savanna Village - Desert Village - Taiga Village ### Compatibility : This mod is designed to ensure maximum compatibility. However, some mods may require their own compatibility pack to achieve perfect results. Overall, it should work with most mods, with the exception of a few unforeseen issues or bugs, of course. Works perfectly with: - Repurposed Structures - ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village - [Bountiful (Datapack Available CLICK HERE)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-villages-bountiful) - [Ice and Fire: Dragons (Datapack Available CLICK HERE)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-villages-ice-and-fire) - [More Villagers (Datapack Available CLICK HERE)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-villages-more-villagers) - [Immersive Engineering (Datapack Available CLICK HERE)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-villages-immersive-engineering) - Waystones - and more... > Note: Other compat are planned for the future, and we are actively working on them. Feel free to check our GitHub to submit a compatibility request. (or join our discord!) ## Discover More Amazing Mods! Enjoy this mod? Don’t miss future updates! Click the Follow button on the project page to get notified when new content is released. 💚🚀 ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord or visit our GitHub to get involved with the community and contribute!
